text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation here. The clean, modern glass walls and minimalist design evoke a space of clarity but also detachment, as if waiting for ideas or people to fill the emptiness. Moving into the second room, color and text spill over the walls, inviting thought. The "R+D" implies experimentation, growth, a place of new connections between mind and machine. I feel as though I am stepping not only through an institution but into the ongoing, uncertain dance of inquiry and discovery.
